text.message: Dopey drew said F u all
Bot really messed this for me
Except you put it there and not the bot
You basically did the same to me
because sheep is useless for red
At least take the 10,5,2 and come down
i really believe black is ahead of me
plus, u have a decent position already
is that an ego thing? certainly I was moving the robber there
why is it every time I play with orange they have a meltdown?
Doesn’t seem like that’s what going on to me
u literally yook a steal as personal, i am worst than blue atm but u will keep taking personal until loosing
idc that you stole from me in that moment
Good job I stopped you blue
yes it was a confirmation of the no
sorry you are hostile and took it differently
and then took it on me
dude, the one time u thought u could win, u unembargoed me
just have a horrible time all the time
u are literally having a better game than red
